'''Hue''' was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Phlog/Legends|Phlog]] who served before the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]] as the bodyguard of [[Jenna Zan Arbor]] while she was on the planet [[Romin]].

{{Char-stub}}
